name: Web Frontend
description: The client-side single-page application (SPA) that GMs and Viewers interact with. It renders the UI and communicates with the backend services.

boundary_definition.summary: This component encompasses all code that runs in the user's web browser. Its boundary is the HTTP API that it uses to communicate with the backend services.

allocated_functions.name: Render all UI Views and Components
allocated_functions.description: This function covers the general responsibility of rendering the UI, which is implicitly required by all user-facing functional requirements.
